# Equipment Delivery Acceptance Condition Verification: Pre-Installation Site Readiness and Delivery Document Review

## 适用受众
Facilities_Manager

## 写作角度说明
设备到场接收是设施经理确认安装条件是否满足的关键节点。在设备到场前，设施经理需要核查土建条件、空间尺寸、电源配置、通风接口等是否满足设备安装要求，并签署到场接收确认文件。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
The most expensive pre-installation discovery is arriving on site to find the equipment cannot be delivered to its final position — the receiving bay ceiling height or corridor width was never verified against the equipment's largest shipping dimension.

## 参考素材
- Site readiness checklist items: structural load capacity (minimum 500 kg/m² for standard airtight doors, 800 kg/m² for pass boxes), ceiling height clearance (minimum equipment height + 300 mm for rigging), corridor width (minimum door width + 600 mm for maneuvering), forklift availability (minimum 3-ton capacity)
- Delivery document requirements: delivery note with serial numbers, factory acceptance test (FAT) certificate, packing list, material certificates (stainless steel grade, gasket material certification)
- Environmental conditions at delivery: temperature range 10-35°C, relative humidity 30-70% RH, no direct sunlight on equipment
- Immediate inspection window: 4-hour window from delivery to photo documentation of shipping condition, damage claim filing deadline typically 7 days

## 关键词
Site Readiness, Delivery Acceptance, Pre-Installation Check, Document Review, Receiving Inspection
